title: Rates-stay-higher / Treasury 약세 / 명목성장 강세
description: 10Y UST yield 5% 돌파, CPI 정체(3.7%), Fed pause but hawkish. equity 부진(SPY -8% from peak), commodity (oil $90+) 강세. 'higher for longer' 컨센서스 굳어진 시점.
consensus_reasoning:
성장은 살아있는데 인플레이션 cooling이 멈춤 = overheating quadrant (growth + inflation 잔존). 이 환경의 자산배분 합의:
- 듀레이션 회피 (Treasury 약세 진행 중)
- 실물자산/commodity overweight (oil, gold strong)
- equity는 유지하되 quality/dividend 쪽 (growth 비싸짐)
- TIPS, short duration 선호
Magic of compounding이 깨진 시기 — risk asset 베타가 안 통하는 환경.
sources: Howard Marks 'Easy Money' memo (2023-09): 'low-rate era is over'
Bridgewater All-Weather Q3 2023 commentary: '60/40 dead in higher-for-longer'
BoFA Global Fund Manager Survey Oct 2023: cash overweight, bond underweight
El-Erian FT column (2023-10): 'inflation stickier than market priced'

required_substitute_groups.name: inflation_hedge
required_substitute_groups.description: Sticky inflation 환경 — commodity, oil, TIPS 어느 형태로든 hedge 확보.
